response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven architectures and distributed systems via open-source and professional work.
Demonstrated hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks) and developer tooling.
Strong engineering culture background with TDD, CI/CD, and technical mentoring experience.
concerns: No verified leadership of 10+ person engineering teams or experience building senior technical leadership layers.
No evidence of production AI systems in fintech, credit risk, or regulated financial compliance contexts.
Lacks demonstrable experience with real-time inference, liquidity optimization, or model-agnostic agentic AI architecture at scale.
